godogen.description: Generate or update this game from a natural language description
godogen.template:
Use skill "godogen" to generate or update the game. User request:

$ARGUMENTS

godot-task.description: Execute one Godot task by loading the godot-task skill
godot-task.prompt: Use skill "godot-task" and execute the provided task block exactly. Follow the skill workflow and required completion report format.
